name: gem-activator
description: Enable the Green Engineering Menu via SD card script - no VCDS required. Prerequisite for all GEM screen modules.
author: dspl1236
scripts: gem_status.sh - Check GEM status without changes
notes: Activates GEM by writing to persistent flash memory. Same mechanism as VCDS adaptation 5F channel 6 = 1. Survives reboots. Reversed by firmware reinstall or gem_disable.sh.
